Headline: #82 Kimball-Homan |Temporary Northbound Reroute near Homan/Van Buren
ShortDescription: Northbound  82 Kimball-Homan buses are temporarily rerouted via Homan, Harrison, Kedzie, Jackson and Homan: due to, street blockage near Homan/Van Buren.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound  #82 Kimball-Homan buses are temporarily rerouted via Homan, Harrison, Kedzie, Jackson and Homan: due to, street blockage near Homan/Van Buren.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
